description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front features a driveway with two parked cars, a single palm tree, and a simple entryway with a door and a few windows. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard area, bordered by a row of small bushes and a large open patio. The windows are arranged in horizontal rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is predominantly white, with subtle accents from the cars and landscaping. The overall structure is geometric and clean, with little ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roofed house with a minimalist white exterior, driveway, and landscaped yard. Features include horizontal window rows, a palm tree, and a spacious backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entry door, palm tree, and several windows.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the large backyard, patio area, and a row of bushes along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open patio, backyard, and multiple windows on both stories.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the driveway, palm tree, and the row of bushes along the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, flanked by windows and a driveway, minimal decorative elements.
